examples: Greed is a miser's preponderant characteristic.
Melancholy is the preponderant mood of the poem.
Livestock husbandry in grassland is the preponderant industry in Inner Mongolia.
In Asia, e-business is even more preponderant than in America and it is likely to stay that way.
But he said a "preponderant" number of peers had expressed concerns about the review which they felt was a lost opportunity.
